message:
🐛 fix: missions search, mission state UX, namespace dropdown (#3962)

- Add search/filter input to the AI Missions sidebar list so users can
  quickly find missions by title or description (#3944)
- Show imported mission steps in the saved-mission view so users can
  review the mission plan without requiring an AI provider (#3917)
- Merge cluster cache namespaces with pod-based namespaces in the REST
  API fallback so namespaces without running pods still appear in the
  GPU reservation namespace dropdown (#3945)

Fixes #3944 #3917 #3945

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
